\tzpentry{ID5865}{Kaluza-Klein Pi Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5865 introduces Kaluza-Klein Pi Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ f_{\rm obs} = f_0 \sqrt{1 + \bigl(m \tfrac{c}{2\pi R_{\rm KK}}\bigr)^2}, \]
